falsification_conditions.condition: SPX closes below 4950 at any point in next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: An 81% match to bottom_2024_aug pattern implies structural support holding; a break below 4950 would violate the August 2024 bottom's key support zone and invalidate the pattern similarity

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for 2 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score of 40 suggests controlled volatility/early recovery phase; sustained VIX above 35 would indicate panic selling not consistent with bottom formation, invalidating the recovery thesis

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops below 3.80% while SPX is below 5100
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would signal flight-to-safety recession fear, breaking the correlation structure of the August 2024 bottom where yields rose with equities; invalidates the macro regime match

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
